case_title: CAMBER, STEPHEN J. VS NASRA, LELA et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNEE OF RECORD IS ASSOCIATED FEE ADJUSTERS. SEE CASE # 739198; ASSIGNEE OF JUDGMENT FILED ON OCT. 23 1995.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 739198 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMBER, STEPHEN J. AS TO DEFENDANT NASRA, LELA MUHAWI, JIHAD J.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NASRA, LELA MUHAWI, JIHAD J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMBER, STEPHEN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASRA, LELA MUHAWI, JIHAD J. $820.61 PRINCIPAL, $807.95 INTEREST, $15.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,643.96, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FOR CASE # 739198. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON MAY 17, 1994. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
